title: Ahsan Burki
description: Photorealistic gemstone renders with caustic light simulation and precise facet geometry.
longDescription: A series of photorealistic gemstone renders featuring accurate caustic light simulation, precise crystalline facet geometry, and custom dispersion shaders. Each stone was modeled with sub-surface scattering and multi-bounce ray tracing for maximum realism.

title: Abstract Torus Sculpture
description: Cinematic abstract sculpture animation with dynamic lighting and volumetric fog.
longDescription: A cinematic abstract sculpture animation created for an immersive digital arts installation. Features dynamic lighting, volumetric fog, and procedural material displacement that responds to audio frequencies.

title: Geometric Pendant Light
description: Photorealistic pendant lamp render with accurate glass refraction and metal finishes.
longDescription: Photorealistic pendant lamp visualization with accurate glass refraction, polished brass finishes, and warm interior illumination. Rendered at 8K for large-format print advertising.
